metrics.evidence_note: STALE — Trend Data operating lines last fed by the 06-10 snapshot; will lag today's live forecast until the sheet's weekday refresh runs.

contradictions.detail: Operating brief figures (CRM forecast $1,870,600; capacity $6,966,378; capacity-not-backed $5,095,778; gap -$8,129,400) exactly match the 2026-06-07 snapshot (git b6ca894) — the brief is a 4-day-old baseline, superseded by live CRM ($1,992,000 forecast) and the 06-10 sheet capacity model ($6,580,214).

Open pipeline fell $4,216,000 (06-10 sheet) to $3,412,000 (06-11 live, -$804K) and open deal count 162 to 142 (-20), but only 4 closed-lost deals ($38K) are recorded this week. Remainder is likely deal amount edits, archived/deleted deals, or a definition mismatch between the sheet snapshot script and hs_is_closed=false. Verify at next sheet weekday refresh.

Sheet Actuals Log shows $0 revenue booked for week of Jun 1-7; live CRM shows one $15,000 closed-won deal. The Actuals Log is not being filled in — CRM is canonical; weekly.json now uses CRM values for closes and revenue.
